rationale: Detected 1 suspicious artifacts. Critical prompt-injection patterns or severe physical anomalies (occlusion) detected.

segments.notes: String entropy is mathematically too high for natural language.
segments.explanation: String entropy is mathematically too high for natural language (5.80 bits/char). Resembles an encoded payload (e.g., Base64 or Hex).
segments.recommended_action: Flag immediately. High-entropy strings in PDF text streams are strongly indicative of encoded malicious payloads meant for downstream LLM execution.

global_recommendation: Reject under policy due to hidden manipulative content, occlusion steganography, or prompt injections.
